message:
feat(ui): Add queued toast notification system and refactor inline toasts

Implement a centralized toast notification system following the existing
OverlayProvider pattern, replacing scattered inline toast state management:

Toast System (Toast.tsx, toast.css):
- Create ToastProvider context with useToast() hook
- Support stacked, auto-dismissing notifications with progress bars
- Four variants: info, success, warning, error
- Optional action buttons for user interaction
- Unique ID-based deduplication (same ID replaces existing toast)
- Smooth CSS animations for enter/exit
- Positioned in bottom-right with proper z-indexing

Tooltip Improvements (Tooltip.tsx, tooltip.css):
- Extract tooltip styles to dedicated stylesheet
- Improve positioning logic for edge cases
- Add arrow pointer for visual connection

App.tsx Refactoring:
- Replace beginnerToast state + manual timer with showToast() hook
- Replace fxSafeModeToast state with showToast() including "Resume FX"
  action button
- Remove timer cleanup useEffect (now handled by Toast system)
- Add transition animation key to detail-card for smoother phage switching

BlockedHotkeyToast.tsx:
- Simplify component by leveraging new toast system infrastructure
- Reduce internal state management complexity

main.tsx:
- Wrap app with ToastProvider in render tree

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
